name: June
tagline: Product analytics for B2B SaaS teams using Segment data
description: June is a product analytics tool built on top of Segment, designed specifically for B2B SaaS companies. It auto-generates reports for key SaaS metrics — activation, retention, churn, company-level analytics — without requiring manual dashboard setup. Simpler and faster to get value from than Mixpanel or Amplitude for early-stage and growth-stage SaaS teams.
pros: Much faster to set up than Amplitude or Mixpanel
Company-level analytics out of the box
use_cases: You already use Segment and want SaaS product metrics — activation rate, retention, churn — surfaced automatically without building dashboards from scratch
Your B2B SaaS needs company-level analytics to see which accounts are healthy, expanding, or at risk, not just individual user events
You're an early-stage or growth-stage SaaS team that wants Mixpanel-quality insights without Mixpanel's setup time and complexity
You want Slack alerts when a key account goes quiet or a new company hits an activation milestone so your team can act immediately
